free_text: Measurements were made for slow and fast neutrons,
the exact neutron energies were not determined.
0.025 eV for slow neutrons and 5 MeV for fast
neutrons are entered by the compiler.
Natural samples or compounds were used.
Errors are of the order of 10% for
lower cross sections and about 25% for the larger cross
Data taken from Table IV of the journal article
Data at 5 MeV deleted. Not this experiment.
